author: kraju

context.author: kraju
context.orig: o kurwa nie wiedziałem że małpy oprócz obsługiwania glocka w fawelach potrafią coś wkleić w google tłumacz , widze małpy szybki progres robią
context.en: oh shit, I didn't know that monkeys, apart from operating a Glock in favelas, can paste something into Google Translator, I see the monkeys are making rapid progress
context.pt: ah, merda, eu não sabia que os macacos, além de operarem uma Glock nas favelas, podem colar algo no Google Translator, vejo que os macacos estão progredindo rapidamente
context.label: racist
